stemHtml: What are the characteristics of the Bora?

options.a: It is a cold and very strong wind that blows mainly in winter from a tableland downwards to the Adriatic
options.b: It is a dry and hot southerly wind experienced in the Sahara desert, that often carries dust.
options.c: It is a very cold wind that blows mainly in winter from a north-westerly direction in the Mediterranean
options.d: It is a warm and moist, south-westerly wind experienced in the eastern Mediterranean, that usually carries precipitation.
